抱.origin: To wrap 包 someone in your arms 扌 — to hug.

sentence.en: Mom is hugging me.

抵.origin: A hand 扌 pushing back — to resist or reach.

押.origin: A hand 扌 holding someone down — to detain or pledge.

抽.origin: A hand 扌 pulling something out 由 — to draw out.

抿.origin: A hand 扌 smoothing or pressing gently — to press together.

拂.origin: A hand 扌 brushing something away — to whisk off.

拄.origin: A hand 扌 leaning on a main 主 support — to lean on a stick.

拈.origin: Picking something up 占 lightly with the fingers 扌.

拌.origin: A hand 扌 stirring things together — to mix.

拎.origin: A hand 扌 carrying something by the handle — to lug.

拓.origin: A hand 扌 pushing past a stone 石 — to open up or expand.

拖.origin: A hand 扌 dragging something along — to pull or tow.

拗.origin: A hand 扌 pulling against the way things bend — to be stubborn.

拘.origin: A hand 扌 holding someone in — to restrain or seize.

招.origin: A hand 扌 calling 召 someone over — to beckon or recruit.

拜.origin: Two hands 手 put together in respect — to bow or worship.

拟.origin: A hand 扌 drawing up a plan — to draft or imitate.

拢.origin: A hand 扌 gathering things together — to bring together.

拣.origin: A hand 扌 picking out the good ones — to choose.

拥.origin: A hand 扌 holding close — to have or to embrace.

拦.origin: A hand 扌 put up to stop someone — to block.

拧.origin: A hand 扌 twisting something tight — to wring or screw.

拨.origin: A hand 扌 pushing things aside or sending them out — to stir.

择.origin: A hand 扌 picking out what you want — to choose.

括.origin: A hand 扌 gathering things in — to enclose or include.

拱.origin: Both hands 扌 raised together 共 — to bow with cupped hands.

拳.origin: A rolled-up hand 手 — a fist.

拴.origin: A hand 扌 tying something so it can't move — to fasten.

拷.origin: A hand 扌 questioning someone hard 考 — to interrogate; also to copy data.

拼.origin: A hand 扌 joining pieces side by side — to put together.

拽.origin: A hand 扌 pulling 曳 something hard — to drag or yank.

指.origin: A hand 扌 pointing the way — finger or to point.

按.origin: A hand 扌 pressing down to keep calm 安 — to push or press.

挎.origin: A hand 扌 carrying something on the arm — to sling.

挠.origin: A hand 扌 scratching — to scratch or to yield.

挣.origin: A hand 扌 fighting 争 to get free — to struggle or earn.

挨.origin: A hand 扌 reaching right next to something — close by or to suffer.

挺.origin: A hand 扌 straightening something up — to stand upright; also 'quite'.
